[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0101011 4
1 0111001 4
2 1100110 4
3 1011100 4
4 0110011 4
5 0001111 4
6 0110101 4
7 1011000 3

01 10 1110111 6
12 21 1010111 5
23 32 0101111 5
34 43 0101111 5
45 54 0111111 6
56 65 1111101 6
67 76 1011000 3 match 7
70 07 0111110 5

02 20 0110110 4
13 31 1111011 6
24 42 0001111 4 match 5
35 53 0111111 6
46 64 1011111 6
57 75 0111101 5
60 06 1111110 6
71 17 1011011 5

14 41 1011111 6
25 52 0110101 4 match 6
36 63 1111011 6
47 74 0011111 5
50 05 0110111 5
61 16 1011011 5
72 27 0011100 3

26 62 1011100 4 match 3
37 73 0111011 5
